translations.text: everlasting youths will go round among them
with glasses, flagons, and cups of a pure drink
that causes no headache or intoxication;
[there will be] any fruit they choose;
the meat of any bird they like;
a reward for what they used to do.

text_qpc_hafs: لَا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوٗا وَلَا تَأۡثِيمًا ٢٥
text_uthmani: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا

translations.text: They will hear no idle or sinful talk there,
Those on the Right, what people they are!
They will dwell amid thornless lote trees
But those on the Left, what people they are!
They will dwell amid scorching wind and scalding water
in the shadow of black smoke,

text_qpc_hafs: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ ٤٧
text_uthmani: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ

translations.text: always saying, ‘What? When we are dead and have become dust and bones, shall we then be raised up?
will all be gathered on a predetermined Day
